channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-07-19 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [07/19] Rooftop Reggae Showcase @ Hazelwood Brew House
item.description:
A free rooftop reggae showcase presented by Roots Sessions featuring Ras Maisha, Blaise, and selectors High Pressure Sound and Kev Reason.

Venue: Hazelwood Brew House

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/19] Argento Fest @ Death Comes Lifting
item.description:
A horror-themed festival afterparty featuring a Giallo soundtrack dance party, film screenings, flash tattoos, pizza, and DJ Strawberry Bloodbath.

Venue: Death Comes Lifting

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/19] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/19] The Activation Tour – Pittsburgh with Derrick Broze (Free Event) @ Steamworks Creative
item.description:
A free Pittsburgh event with Derrick Broze exploring community building, self-reliance, homesteading, practical solutions, and live music.

Venue: Steamworks Creative

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/19] Dust Bowl Faeries, Bronwen Fair, Colin and the Crows @ Owl Hollow
item.description:
A folk and roots music showcase featuring Dust Bowl Faeries, Bronwen Fair, and Colin and the Crows at OWL Hollow.

Venue: Owl Hollow

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/19] Lonely No More: Indigo Baloch @ Apteka
item.description:
Lonely No More — Sundays in July at Apteka. This week: Indigo Baloch.

Venue: Apteka

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/20] CNM Social Club @ Belvederes
item.description:
CNM Social Club at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive, free, 7–10pm.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/20] Allure: Night for the Dolls @ Mary&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s
item.description:
A glamorous 21+ club night at Mary's in Pittsburgh featuring beats by DJ Cereza.

Venue: Mary&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/20] Packrats Birthday Bash @ Collapse
item.description:
Packrats Birthday Bash featuring noise, techno, experimental rap, electro, and more — July 20th, 10pm to 4am.

Venue: Collapse

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/21] On Topic: Free Expression with Jacob Mchangama & Nadine Strossen @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Join us for a moderated discussion among free speech experts about the role free expression plays in maintaining a democratic government.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/22] Queerness is Nature - Mushroom Walk with Maria Pinto @ Frick Environmental Center
item.description:
Celebrate summer with a mushroom walk at Frick Park with author &amp; mycophile Maria Pinto!

Venue: Frick Environmental Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/22] Skallar, Dukkha, Heavy Smoker @ Polish Hell Oubliette
item.description:
A raw punk and crust night featuring Skallar, Dukha, and Heavy Smoker at Polish Hell.

Venue: Polish Hell Oubliette

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/22] Argo and the Violet Queens with Heading North and Rebel Revolver @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Argo and the Violet Queens headline Mr. Roboto with support from Heading North and Rebel Revolver on July 22nd.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/22] Lizabanks Campagna @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
A calender of events, concerts, club nights, weekly and monthly events series, promoters, artists, producers, djs, venues and other entities.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/22] 412 Step Late Night @ Belvederes
item.description:
412 Step Late Night line dancing at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/23] Speed Plans / Nasty Nancy / Piss Me Off / S.M.H.E @ Penn Ave Tattoo
item.description:
Four-band punk/hardcore show at Penn Avenue Tattoo in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Penn Ave Tattoo

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/23] Thursday Night Jazz: Steve Ippolito Trio’s Minimalist Improvisational Roots Sounds
item.description:
Steve Ippolito joins forces with trumpeter Brad Fritcher and bassist Denzel Chismar-Oliver to experiment with jazz and electronic roots and traverse new sonic planes.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/23] Sh!tomato @ Incurably Optimistic
item.description:
An evening of live music at Incurably Optimistic featuring Sh!tomato, Borbo x Prism, Ruby, and daby.

Venue: Incurably Optimistic

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/23] Once More Into The Deep @ Belvederes
item.description:
Once More Into The Deep — a deep house night at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/23] "That Fresh Air" Tour @ The Government Center
item.description:
Caribbean Breeze Records &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Sound Art Reality present the "That Fresh Air" Tour live at The Government Center in Pittsburgh.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/24] Friday Night Specials: The Garment District + Muzzle Tung @ Mattress Factory
item.description:
Live music in the Winnifred Lutz Garden featuring The Garment District and Muzzle Tung.

Venue: Mattress Factory

item.title: [07/24] MESS @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
Punk show at 222 Ormsby featuring No Time, The Stress, Seclusion, and Drastic Action with DJ Drago.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

item.description:

item.description:
Y2K with Gunray & itsdatjawn at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

item.title: [07/24] Celestial Bodies: Leo SZN
item.description:
An open format dance party where every track is by a Leo artist, featuring DJs Lemonline, Formosa, and Himboza at Spirit Lodge.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/24] Fuckboy Summer Vol. 2 @ Gallery AFK
item.description:
A late night, feral summer club party at Gallery AFK featuring seven DJ acts across three back-to-back sets.

Venue: Gallery AFK

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/25] Launching Peace presented by Assemble, Black NASA & Daid Roy featuring live soundscapes by trē seguritan abalos, How Things Are, Petra Floyd, and BusCrates @ Carnegie Museum of Art
item.description:

item.description:

Venue: Roboto Project

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: [07/25] M.E.L.T. Anniversary Show + Live Recording @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
M.E.L.T. celebrates their anniversary with a live recording show at the Sanctuary at Mr. Smalls, with special guest Jack Swing.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

item.title: [07/25] Zorn & Fuzzfiend @ The Courts
item.description:
A two-band heavy show featuring Zorn and Fuzzfiend at The Courts, with a rain backup at Rock Room.

Venue: The Courts

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: [07/27] Vomit Dolls / Body Farm / Razorblade @ Polish Hell Oubliette
item.description:
Vomit Dolls (on tour from MA) headline an all-ages beatdown at The Polish Hell Oubliette with Body Farm and Razorblade.

Venue: Polish Hell Oubliette

item.title: [07/27] World Literature: Dimitry Elias Léger’s “Death of the Soccer God” (Haiti) with Anderson Tepper @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Author Dimitry Elias Léger shares his latest novel, part sports story and part passionate and improbable love story.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/28] Rolo Tomassi with Guillermo Guillotine @ Preserving Underground
item.description:
UK post-hardcore/math rock band Rolo Tomassi performs at Preserving Underground in New Kensington, PA with support from Guillermo Guillotine.

Venue: Preserving Underground

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/28] Artist in Exile: Fatimah Asghar’s “Daughter of the Mountains: Poems of Heartbreak and Homecoming”
item.description:
Join us for Fatimah Asghar's presentation of new meditative poems.

item.description:

item.title: [07/28] Pearl & The Oysters + Monkey Mind US & CA Tour @ Spirit
item.description:
Pearl &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; The Oysters and Monkey Mind bring their US &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; CA tour to Spirit Lodge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/29] Abyecta, Fan Club, Martin @ Rock Room
item.description:
A punk night featuring Abyecta from Chile, Fan Club from Seattle, and local noise punk act Martin making their first show debut.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/29] World of Music: Bombici (Mutant Balkan Dance Music)
item.description:
Bombici brings uncommon time signatures, folks songs, dance music, and improvisational sounds to the Alphabet City stage.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/30] Thursday Night Jazz: Kente Summer Madness Presents Thomas Wendt Quintet Celebrates Thad Mosley
item.description:
Thomas Wendt shows his versatility and expressive drumming prowess in the second installment of the Kente Summer Madness series.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/30] The Final Hour of Christ: Profanatica, One Master, Ritual Mass, Extortion Cellar @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Legendary black/death metal act Profanatica headlines an intense night of extreme metal at Thunderbird Music Hall with One Master, Ritual Mass, and Extortion Cellar.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/30] Brickwall Chartbusters @ Belvederes
item.description:
Brickwall Chartbusters — a night of punk &amp;amp;amp; wave hits at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/30] Non-Stop Erotic Cabaret @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
A post-punk, new wave, 80s goth &amp;amp;amp; synth sleaze DJ night at Poetry in Pittsburgh with DJs Rameau's Nephew and Aconite.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Hprizm: Sound of the City @ Wood Street Galleries
item.description:
An extended gallery exhibition by Hprizm (High Priest) exploring the sound and culture of the city, presented at Wood Street Galleries in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Wood Street Galleries

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Spray Paint the Walls: A Collection of Classic Punk Flyers @ Field Day
item.description:
An art exhibition of classic punk flyers hosted Field Day in collaboration with '77 Club

Venue: Field Day

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Summerween at The Soft Spot @ The Soft Spot
item.description:
A spooky summer party with DJ Faerie Fey, costume contest, watermelon carving, and more at The Soft Spot.

Venue: The Soft Spot

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Silvis On Tour @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Silvis brings their tour to Pittsburgh with support from Calico Dogs and Net Force at Mr. Roboto Project.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Golems of the Red Planet with We Take Requests @ Bellefield Hall
item.description:
Instrumental jazz-rock quintet Golems of the Red Planet reinterprets John Zorn's Masada, with openers We Take Requests, at Bellefield Hall in Oakland.

Venue: Bellefield Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Easier Said Than Done: Abstract Theory Album Release Party @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Abstract Theory celebrates their album release at Mr. Smalls Funhouse with special guests Dream The Heavy and Young Guy Durkett.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Once on This Island @ Charity Randall Theatre
item.description:
Join Alumni Theater Company (ATC) in telling the story of Ti Moune, a fearless young girl who dares to cross the boundaries of class, culture, and even the gods themselves in pursuit of love.

Venue: Charity Randall Theatre

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/31] Power Pop Girls @ Belvederes
item.description:
Power Pop Girls with Gunray at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [08/01] Backyard Blessings @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A two-day outdoor music and community gathering hosted by Evergreen Acres featuring live music, DJs, a geodesic dome stage, sacred fire, drum circle, and camping.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [08/01] Guarded Secret / xThreatx / Fuzz Lash / Possum @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
HockeyxDad Booking presents a heavy punk/metal showcase featuring Guarded Secret (members of Full of Hell), xThreatx, Fuzz Lash, and Possum at 222 Ormsby in Pittsburgh.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [08/01] Camp Gloom @ Squirrel Hill Sports Bar
item.description:
A goth dance party hosted by DJ Strawberry Bloodbath with guest DJs Zona Morta at Squill Sports Bar.

Venue: Squirrel Hill Sports Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [08/01] Sediment @ Collapse
item.description:
A late-night underground electronic and experimental music event hosted by Cab308 x Eye of Cleo at Collapse in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Collapse

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [08/01] Hoagie Dreams @ Hot Mass
item.description:
Hot Mass presents Hoagie Dreams, an all-night dance party at their Pittsburgh venue on August 1st, 2026.

Venue: Hot Mass

View event on Arcane City
